title: EXTRASTAR 6W MR16 LED Bulbs, 12 Volt, 44W Equivalent, 540 Lumen, 6500K Cool White Daylight Light Bulb, Non-dimmable, Pack of 6
features: 【Energy Saving MR16 Bulb】: 6W MR16 LED bulb is equivalent to a 44W traditional led bulb, reducing electricity bills by more than 80%.
【Decent Quality】: Lasts up to 20,000 hours (compare with other LED bulb with 15,000h ), reduces the re-lamp frequency, and lowers your maintenance costs.
【Eco-Friendly】: No mercury, no lead. No UV, IR radiation, or harmful substances, no flickering bulbs, protect your eyes from hurting.
【Wide Application】: With a standard MR16 base, easy to install with low voltage 12V LED transformer. You can use them in offices, restaurants, living rooms, dining rooms, kitchens, etc.
【Pay Attention】: For 12V AC/DC low voltage only. Do not use it on any fixtures with more than 12V input.
description: Product Description Product Specifications Size 50mm*53mm Lumen 540LM Base MR16 Color 3000K/4200K/6500K CRI ＞80 Beam Angle 120° Dimmable No dimmable, please do not use with the dimmer Pay Attention For 12V AC/DC low voltage only Energy Saving 6W MR16 light bulbs are equal to 44W traditional led bulbs, saving more than 80% on your electricity bill. No Flicker This MR16 LED light bulb does not flicker or glare, creating a comfortable light and preventing eyestrain. High CRI The MR16 light bulb has a high CRI> 80 and provides vivid color effects to better protect your eyes. Wide Application（3000K/4200K/6500K）
